{"body":"Please provide as much information as you can:

* **GO term ID and Label**

GO:0036506 maintenance of unfolded protein
Maintaining a protein in an unfolded, soluble state. 

* **Reason for deprecation** Put an x in the appropriate box: 

 - [ ] The reason for obsoletion is that this term represents a molecular function.



* **"Replace by" term (ID and label)**
If all annotations can safely be moved to that term

(Probably? ) 
[GO:0140309](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/QuickGO/term/GO:0140309)    unfolded protein holdase activity

* **"Consider" term(s) (ID and label)**
Suggestions for reannotation

* **Are there annotations to this term?**
- How many EXP:
31

* **Are there mappings and cross references to this term? (InterPro, Keywords; check QuickGO cross-references section)**

* **Is this term in a subset? (check the AmiGO page for that term)**

* **Any other information**


----
Checklist for ontology editor

***Check term usage and metadata in Protégé***
- [ ] check term usage in the ontology 
- [ ] check internal mappings: RHEA, EC, MetaCyc
- [ ] check subset usage
- [ ] check taxon constraints 

***Check annotations***
- [ ] create Annotation Review spreadsheet 
- * Annotation Review template: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1izV3q1jnq_Ybg5MJ53O_b5BCTkGtjl_Fi-cOg3-7eBE/edit#gid=0
- * Instructions: https://wiki.geneontology.org/Annotation_Review_Request
- [ ] create annotation review ticket: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/new?assignees=&labels=annotation+review&template=annotation-review-for-obsoletion.md&title=Review+annotations+to+%5BINSERT+GO+TERM%5D
- [ ] find external mappings (via IEAS), include in obsoletion notice  
- [ ] tag curators in Annotation Review ticket. Responsible annotator for each group: https://github.com/geneontology/go-site/blob/master/metadata/group-contacts.csv

***Notification***
- [ ] create [obsoletion announcement](https://github.com/geneontology/go-announcements/issues/new?assignees=&labels=obsoletion&template=obsoletion-notice.md&title=Obsoletion+notice%3A+%5BGO+ID%3A+term+label%5D)
- [ ] announce to GO friends (go-friends@mailman.stanford.edu)
- [ ] paste the text in the ontology ticket
","comments":[{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws72rI36","author":{"login":"raymond91125"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"@dragon-ai-agent please check if GO:0036506 maintenance of unfolded protein has been used by other ontologies.","createdAt":"2026-03-26T21:51:13Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[{"content":"EYES","users":{"totalCount":1}}],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31758#issuecomment-4138503674","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws72rKAd","author":{"login":"dragon-ai-agent"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"🤖 Working on it...

Follow along: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/23619800601)

*— @dragon-ai-agent*","createdAt":"2026-03-26T21:51:35Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31758#issuecomment-4138508317","viewerDidAuthor":true},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws72regU","author":{"login":"dragon-ai-agent"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"## Research: External Ontology Usage of GO:0036506 "maintenance of unfolded protein"

I've investigated whether GO:0036506 is referenced by other ontologies. Here are the findings:

### External References Found

1. **Wikidata** - The term is represented as Wikidata item **Q22311044**, imported as part of GO's integration with Wikidata.

2. **UMLS/NCI Metathesaurus** - Assigned UMLS Concept Unique Identifier: **C4236881**, integrated into biomedical terminology standards.

### Resources Checked with No Direct Cross-References

- **OLS (Ontology Lookup Service)** - Term is indexed but no external ontology cross-references beyond GO itself
- **BioPortal** - Present as part of GO, but no specific mappings to other ontologies
- **Reactome** - No direct pathway entries reference this term
- **InterPro/PANTHER** - No InterPro2GO mapping found
- **Human Phenotype Ontology (HPO)** - No cross-references found
- **Other OBO Foundry ontologies** - No evidence of import or cross-reference

### Internal GO Usage

Within GO itself, the term is not referenced by other terms (no children, no other terms point to it). Note that **GO:1904378** "maintenance of unfolded protein involved in ERAD pathway" (a former child term) has already been obsoleted with the comment that it should be represented as a GO-CAM model.

### Conclusion

**GO:0036506 has minimal external ontology dependencies.** The only external integrations are:
- Wikidata (automatic import of GO terms)
- UMLS Metathesaurus (for terminology integration)

Neither of these represent curated cross-references that would require coordination for obsoletion. The obsoletion of this term should not create issues for other ontologies.

*— @dragon-ai-agent*","createdAt":"2026-04-02T23:11:22Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31758#issuecomment-4180944050","viewerDidAuthor":true},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws75NL9l","author":{"login":"dragon-ai-agent"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"PR created: #31820

GO:0036506 "maintenance of unfolded protein" has been obsoleted with `replaced_by: GO:0140309` (unfolded protein holdase activity).

The rationale is that this term describes what is fundamentally a molecular function -- keeping a protein in an unfolded, soluble state is holdase activity -- rather than a distinct biological process.

**Annotation impact summary:**
- 381 total annotations in QuickGO
- 12 have experimental evidence (EXP/IDA/IMP), covering 8 gene products across human and E. coli K-12, supported by 9 PMIDs
- The remaining 369 are electronic/computational (IEA, IBA, ISO)

Since the replacement is cross-namespace (BP to MF), an annotation review ticket should be created to coordinate the reannotation of the 12 experimental annotations. The IEA annotations will be handled automatically in the next pipeline run.

All validation passes (`make travis_build` clean).

content.thinking: So the user wants me to update the existing PR #31820 to change the obsoletion from using `replaced_by` to using `consider` tags for GO:0140309 and GO:0140597. Let me check the PR and the current state of the branch.

content.text: Let me check the existing PR and branch.

content.content:
{"body":"## Summary

Obsoletes GO:0036506 "maintenance of unfolded protein" as requested in #31758. The term describes what is essentially a molecular function (holdase activity) rather than a biological process.

**Replacement term:** GO:0140309 "unfolded protein holdase activity" (molecular_function)

## Changes to GO:0036506

- Name: `obsolete maintenance of unfolded protein`
- Definition: prefixed with `OBSOLETE.`
- Removed `is_a: GO:0031647 regulation of protein stability`
- Added `is_obsolete: true`
- Added `replaced_by: GO:0140309`
- Added obsoletion reason comment
- Added term_tracker_item linking to #31758

## Cross-namespace note

The replacement is a cross-namespace change (BP to MF). This is appropriate here since the concept being described ("maintaining a protein in an unfolded, soluble state") is fundamentally a molecular activity (holdase function), not a biological process.

## Annotation impact

- **381 total annotations** (QuickGO)
- **350 IEA** (electronic) -- will be automatically handled
- **12 experimental annotations** across 8 gene products (human and E. coli K-12):
  - AHSA1 (EXP/IDA, PMID:37486705)
  - hslO (IDA, PMID:14685279, PMID:22385960)
  - surA (IDA, PMID:26344570)
  - secB (IMP/IDA, PMID:2834066, PMID:2848249)
  - BAG6 (IMP, PMID:21636303)
  - cnoX (IDA, PMID:29754824)
  - GET4 (IMP, PMID:21636303)
  - USP13 (IMP, PMID:24424410)
  - BAG6-UBL4A-GET4 complex (IMP, PMID:21636303)
- **11 IBA** (phylogenetic) annotations
- **8 ISO** (sequence orthology) annotations

An annotation review ticket should be created to coordinate reannotation of the 12 experimental annotations to GO:0140309.

## Validation

- [x] Pre-validation: ontology passes all SPARQL checks before changes
- [x] Post-validation: `make travis_build` passes (all 20 SPARQL rules + ELK reasoning)

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN: Issue analyzed, intent clear
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION: Ontology valid before changes
- [x] TERM-SEARCH: No other GO terms reference GO:0036506
- [x] EDITS: Proper checkout/checkin procedure followed
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS: All logical axioms removed from obsolete term
- [x] METADATA: term_tracker_item, comment, replaced_by all present
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION: `make travis_build` passes
- [x] No taxon constraints to remove
- [x] No external ontology dependencies requiring coordination
- N/A RESEARCH: not needed for straightforward obsoletion
- N/A DESIGN-PATTERNS: not applicable for obsoletion

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-6`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @raymond91125
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/23926239825)","headRefName":"dragon-ai-agent-issue-31758-run7148","state":"OPEN"}

content.content:
[Term]
id: GO:0140309
name: unfolded protein holdase activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "A protein carrier activity that binds to a protein in an unfolded state and escorts it to an acceptor molecule or to a specific location. The unfolded protein carrier prevents aggregation of the target protein while it's being delivers to its final destination." [PMID:39488384]
comment: Note that an holdase binds an unfolded protein and keeps it unfolded, unlike a protein folding chaperone, which binds an unfolded protein to fold it.
synonym: "holdase" EXACT []
synonym: "holdase-carrier chaperone" EXACT []
synonym: "unfolded protein carrier activity" EXACT []

content.text: Now update the PR description and comment on the issue.

input.command:
gh pr edit 31820 --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Obsoletes GO:0036506 "maintenance of unfolded protein" as requested in #31758. The term describes what is essentially a molecular function (holdase activity) rather than a biological process.

**Consider terms:**
- GO:0140309 "unfolded protein holdase activity" (molecular_function)
- GO:0140597 "protein carrier activity" (molecular_function)

## Changes to GO:0036506

- Name: `obsolete maintenance of unfolded protein`
- Definition: prefixed with `OBSOLETE.`
- Removed `is_a: GO:0031647 regulation of protein stability`
- Added `is_obsolete: true`
- Added `consider: GO:0140309` and `consider: GO:0140597`
- Added obsoletion reason comment
- Added term_tracker_item linking to #31758

## Cross-namespace note

The consider terms are both in molecular_function. `consider` (rather than `replaced_by`) is used because this is a cross-namespace change and annotations will need case-by-case review.

## Annotation impact

- **381 total annotations** (QuickGO)
- **350 IEA** (electronic) -- will be automatically handled
- **12 experimental annotations** across 8 gene products (human and E. coli K-12)
- **11 IBA** (phylogenetic) annotations
- **8 ISO** (sequence orthology) annotations

An annotation review ticket should be created to coordinate reannotation of the experimental annotations.

## Validation

- [x] Pre-validation: ontology passes all SPARQL checks before changes
- [x] Post-validation: all 16 SPARQL rules pass

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN: Issue analyzed, intent clear
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION: Ontology valid before changes
- [x] TERM-SEARCH: No other GO terms reference GO:0036506; consider terms verified
- [x] EDITS: Proper checkout/checkin procedure followed
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS: All logical axioms removed from obsolete term
- [x] METADATA: term_tracker_item, comment, consider tags all present
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION: SPARQL checks pass
- [x] No taxon constraints to remove
- [x] No external ontology dependencies requiring coordination
- N/A RESEARCH: not needed for straightforward obsoletion
- N/A DESIGN-PATTERNS: not applicable for obsoletion

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-6`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @raymond91125
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/23926772302)
EOF
)" --repo geneontology/go-ontology
